content.description: Renders related-items-widget items. Shows all forward and inverse relationships for the currently selected item.
content.hob:
;; Related Items View — displays forward and inverse relationships for the selected item

(let [widget-type-id "1e9ffc8d-0e0d-4020-9865-b4ca6a05cbae"

      forward-groups [["Type" :type true]
                      ["Tags" :tags false]
                      ["Parent" :parent true]
                      ["Extends" :extends true]
                      ["For Type" :forType true]
                      ["Preferred View" :preferredView true]
                      ["Attachments" :attachments false]
                      ["Links To" :outgoingLinks false]]

      inverse-groups [["Instances" :instances false]
                      ["Tagged With" :taggedWith false]
                      ["Parent Of" :children false]
                      ["Subtypes" :subtypes false]
                      ["Attached To" :containers false]
                      ["Linked From" :incomingLinks false]
                      ["Views For" :viewsFor false]
                      ["Preferred By" :preferredBy false]]

      ;; Render a single item link row, with optional display-name override
      render-link (fn [id display-name]
        (let [it (get-item id)]
          (if it
            (let [type-item (get-item (:type it))]
              [:div {:style "display: flex; align-items: baseline; gap: 6px; padding: 3px 0; cursor: pointer; border-radius: var(--border-radius);"
                     :on-click (fn [e] (open-item! id))}
                [:span {:style "color: var(--color-link, #2563eb); font-size: 0.8125rem;"}
                  (or display-name (:name it) (subs id 0 8))]
                (when type-item
                  [:span {:style "color: var(--color-border-dark); font-size: 0.6875rem;"}
                    (or (:name type-item) "")])])
            [:div {:style "padding: 3px 0;"}
              [:span {:style "color: var(--color-border-dark); font-style: italic; font-size: 0.8125rem;"}
                (str "[deleted: " (subs id 0 13) "]")]])))

      ;; Render a group (label + deduplicated, sorted, truncated item links)
      truncate-limit 30
      render-group (fn [label ids use-fqn]
        (let [unique (distinct ids)
              sorted (sort-by (fn [id]
                       (str/lower-case
                         (if use-fqn
                           (or (get-fqn! id nil) "")
                           (or (:name (get-item id)) "")))) unique)
              truncated (> (count sorted) truncate-limit)
              display (if truncated (take truncate-limit sorted) sorted)]
          [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 12px;"}
            [:div {:style "font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; font-size: 0.8125rem;"} label]
            [:div {:style "padding-left: 8px;"}
              (for [id display]
                (render-link id (when use-fqn (get-fqn! id nil))))
              (when truncated
                [:div {:style "font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-border-dark); font-style: italic; padding: 2px 0;"}
                  (str "\u2026 and " (- (count sorted) truncate-limit) " more")])]]))

      ;; Render Tagged With with sub-group sections
      render-tagged-with (fn [label selected-id]
        (let [tag-groups (get-tagged-with-grouped! selected-id)
              root-name (get-fqn! selected-id nil)]
          (if (> (count tag-groups) 1)
            ;; Multiple sub-groups: render each with a path label
            [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 12px;"}
              [:div {:style "font-weight: 600; margin-bottom: 4px; font-size: 0.8125rem;"} label]
              (for [tg tag-groups]
                (let [tag-id (:tagId tg)
                      items (:items tg)
                      path (if (= tag-id selected-id)
                             root-name
                             (str root-name " / " (get-fqn! tag-id selected-id)))
                      unique (distinct items)
                      sorted (sort-by (fn [id] (str/lower-case (or (:name (get-item id)) ""))) unique)
                      truncated (> (count sorted) truncate-limit)
                      display (if truncated (take truncate-limit sorted) sorted)]
                  [:div {:style "margin-left: 8px; margin-bottom: 8px;"}
                    [:div {:style "font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-border-dark); margin-bottom: 2px;"}
                      (str path " (" (count sorted) ")")]
                    [:div {:style "padding-left: 8px;"}
                      (for [id display] (render-link id nil))
                      (when truncated
                        [:div {:style "font-size: 0.75rem; color: var(--color-border-dark); font-style: italic; padding: 2px 0;"}
                          (str "\u2026 and " (- (count sorted) truncate-limit) " more")])]]))]
            ;; Single or no groups: render as flat list
            (let [all-ids (vec (mapcat (fn [g] (:items g)) tag-groups))]
              (when (seq all-ids)
                (render-group label all-ids false))))))

      ;; Render a section (heading + non-empty groups)
      render-section (fn [section-label groups related selected-id]
        (let [non-empty (vec (filter (fn [g]
                        (let [key (nth g 1)
                              is-single (nth g 2)
                              value (get related key)]
                          (if is-single
                            (not (nil? value))
                            (and (sequential? value) (seq value)))))
                      groups))]
          (when (seq non-empty)
            [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 16px;"}
              [:h3 {:style "margin: 0 0 8px 0; font-size: 0.8125rem; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; color: var(--color-border-dark);"}
                section-label]
              (for [g non-empty]
                (let [label (nth g 0)
                      key (nth g 1)
                      is-single (nth g 2)
                      value (get related key)
                      ids (if is-single [value] value)]
                  (cond
                    ;; Tagged With: use grouped rendering
                    (= key :taggedWith)
                      (render-tagged-with label selected-id)
                    ;; Tags: use FQN display names
                    (= key :tags)
                      (render-group label ids true)
                    :else
                      (render-group label ids false))))])))

      ;; Get selected item ID
      selected-id (or (get-in item [:content :targetId]) (get-selection!))
      selected-item (when selected-id (get-item selected-id))
      related (when selected-item (get-related! selected-id))]

  [:div {:style "max-width: 600px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 12px; font-size: 0.875rem;"}

    ;; Header
    [:div {:style "margin-bottom: 16px; padding-bottom: 12px; border-bottom: 2px solid var(--color-border-light);"}
      (cond
        (nil? selected-id)
          [:h2 {:style "margin: 0; font-size: 0.875rem; color: var(--color-border-dark); font-style: italic;"}
            "Select an item to see relationships"]
        (nil? selected-item)
          [:h2 {:style "margin: 0; font-size: 1.125rem; color: var(--color-border-dark); font-style: italic;"}
            "Item not found"]
        :else
          [:h2 {:style "margin: 0; font-size: 1rem;"}
            (str "Related to: " (or (:name selected-item) (subs selected-id 0 8)))])]

    ;; Body (only when we have related data)
    (when related
      [:div {}
        (render-section "Forward" forward-groups related selected-id)
        (render-section "Inverse" inverse-groups related selected-id)])])
